content_references_disabled.description: If true, the response will not include content references.

connectorId.description: Required connector identifier to route the request.

conversationId.description: A string that does not contain only whitespace characters.

isStream.description: If true, the response will be streamed in chunks.

messages.description: List of chat messages exchanged so far.

model.description: Model ID or name to use for the response.

persist.description: Whether to persist the chat and response to storage.

responseLanguage.description: ISO language code for the assistant's response.
